# Ciphr invests in MyTeamBuilder to boost AI-driven HR coaching

Fri, 5th Dec 2025

By Sean Mitchell, Publisher

HR software provider Ciphr has acquired a stake in MyTeamBuilder, a UK-based startup focused on AI-driven coaching for businesses, expanding its portfolio of HR technology solutions.

Strategic investment

The partnership sees Ciphr deepen its investment in artificial intelligence, following several acquisitions in recent years. Ciphr currently supplies integrated HR, payroll, benefits, eLearning, and recruitment services to over 1,400 organisations globally. With this move, customers will gain access to MyTeamBuilder's AI coaching capabilities.

Founded in 2023, MyTeamBuilder offers an AI-based coaching platform designed for employees at every level, not just for executives. The platform's roots in psychological research support businesses aiming to enhance team cohesion, improve engagement, and retain talent by fostering stronger communication and collaboration.

Coaching features

MyTeamBuilder provides employees with a personal AI coach offering data-driven resources and round-the-clock support for professional development. The platform tailors insights, recommendations, and reminders for individual users, maintaining confidentiality throughout the process.

Managers receive access to these personal development tools and additional analytics. The system delivers real-time insights about team members' personality types, motives, and strengths, based on psychometric profiles. Such information, according to the company, can assist managers-especially those newly promoted or with expanding teams-to adapt their leadership approaches and better support team members.

Organisational insight

The use of advanced machine learning allows the system to become more effective with every interaction. As managers and employees engage with their AI advisor, the underlying algorithms refine coaching suggestions for greater relevance and utility. Practical applications cited include managing team dynamics, optimising task allocation, and anticipating workplace challenges such as potential personality conflicts.

The platform also features live mood tracking and topic analysis, giving HR departments access to anonymised, real-time organisational sentiment. Weekly reports offer details on mood shifts, training uptake, and engagement levels, removing the need for traditional surveys. This allows organisations to monitor workforce morale and address issues proactively.

results.title: Phenom Acquires Included AI, Bringing Agentic People Analytics To HR And Business Leaders
results.author: Amit Chowdhry
results.text:
Phenom Acquires Included AI, Bringing Agentic People Analytics To HR And Business Leaders 

# Phenom Acquires Included AI, Bringing Agentic People Analytics To HR And Business Leaders

By Amit Chowdhry • Jan 15, 2026

Phenom Acquires Included AI, Bringing Agentic People Analytics To HR And Business Leaders

Phenom, an applied AI company focused on helping organizations hire, develop, and retain talent, announced it has acquired Included, an AI-native agentic people analytics platform that turns fragmented workforce data into actionable insights for faster decision-making.

The acquisition is aimed at expanding Phenom’s workforce intelligence capabilities by giving HR teams and business leaders broader access to analytics that have traditionally required specialized data resources. Phenom said the combination will help organizations move beyond static reporting to identify trends, diagnose bottlenecks, and take corrective action across the talent lifecycle.

Companies of all sizes have pushed to become more data-driven in their talent strategy, but many continue to struggle to consolidate information spread across core HR systems, recruiting tools, engagement platforms, and performance management solutions. In large enterprises, that complexity often forces reliance on analysts to stitch together reporting across tech stacks; in smaller organizations, similar questions can go unanswered due to limited analytics bandwidth. Phenom said Included’s technology is intended to close that gap by standardizing workforce data and delivering insights in natural language to a broader set of users, from executives to line managers.

Included is known for proprietary algorithms that address inconsistencies and gaps in people data—issues that can undermine analytics accuracy and limit the usefulness of AI-driven recommendations. The platform pairs that foundation with a canonical data model and ontology that can ingest additional data sources and adapt to an organization’s specific structure and needs. Phenom said this framework powers AI-generated narratives that highlight organizational health, hiring bottlenecks, workforce trends and potential outliers, enabling teams to surface risks and opportunities faster.

Phenom plans to integrate Included natively into its applied AI platform, expanding the breadth of connected workforce data available to customers. As part of that integration, Included’s agentic AI is expected to complement Phenom’s Workforce Intelligence solution by adding a conversational interface for exploring workforce questions, assessing potential business risks and receiving recommendations and action plans through prompts and natural language queries. Phenom also said the experience will be personalized, surfacing the most relevant insights based on a user’s role and behavior.

The combined offering is positioned to support unified people analytics and workforce planning across functions, including talent acquisition, engagement and performan

# Phenom Acquires Included AI, Bringing Agentic People Analytics & Actionable Workforce Insights to Every HR Professional and Business Leader

Acquisition Solves Complex Enterprise Data Challenges, Empowering All Organizations to Advance Workforce Planning

Phenom, the leader in applied AI that helps organizations hire faster, develop better, and retain longer, today announced it acquired Included, an AI-native agentic people analytics platform that surfaces actionable insights for faster, smarter workforce decision-making. Further strengthening Phenom’s application of AI for workforce intelligence, all human resources professionals and executives will be empowered to not only access deeper data insights, but take action that drives workforce planning and growth.

This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260114152050/en/

Phenom, the leader in applied AI that helps organizations hire faster, develop better, and retain longer, today announced it acquired Included, an AI-native agentic people analytics platform that surfaces actionable insights for faster, smarter workforce decision-making. Further strengthening Phenom’s application of AI for workforce intelligence, all human resources professionals and executives will be empowered to not only access deeper data insights, but take action that drives workforce planning and growth.

Phenom’s acquisition of Included expands the value of applying intelligence, automation and experience to people analytics, continuing its commitment to delivering outcome-based AI solutions that address HR’s biggest challenges. As organizations strive to make their talent operations more data-driven, many struggle with consolidating data from disparate systems and quickly drawing relevant insights. Enterprises depend on business analysts to connect the dots within and across tech stacks, while other companies have to extract information without dedicated resources. To remain competitive in today’s volatile talent market, companies of all sizes require immediate access to deep insights that enable workforce planning and hiring precision.

Enhancing Workforce Decisions with Intelligent, Actionable People Analytics

results.title: ECI-backed HR software provider Ciphr acquires minority stake in MyTeamBuilder, an AI-powered coaching start-up
results.text:
ECI-backed HR software provider Ciphr acquires minority stake in MyTeamBuilder, an AI-powered coaching start-up

<- All M&A News

December 4, 2025

# ECI-backed HR software provider Ciphr acquires minority stake in MyTeamBuilder, an AI-powered coaching start-up

Press Release

UK-based HR software provider Ciphr, backed by ECI Partners since 2020, has acquired a minority stake in MyTeamBuilder, a start-up established in 2023 that offers AI-powered coaching to enhance team collaboration and employee engagement. The investment will support MyTeamBuilder's growth and its integration into Ciphr's offerings, which are used by over 1,400 organisations worldwide, with the latter intending to leverage AI insights to improve workforce decision-making and organisational collaboration.

Please log in to see all details

Transaction announcement

## FAQs

Answers to questions you might have about M&A Insights from NKP.

### What does M&A Insights do?

​Established in 2018 by a former private equity investment manager, NKP | M&A Insights is an independent and highly specialized information services provider to investors and advisory firms which are active in the mergers and acquisitions (M&A) market.

### Who is M&A Insights for?

​Our fast growing client base spans the entire M&A ecosystem, including private equity funds, direct lenders, investment banks, corporate finance boutiques, law firms, auditing firms, strategy consultancies, and transaction insurance providers to name a few.

### How is M&A Insights different from traditional providers?

​The frequency, quality, and timing of cases and opportunities covered is of a different order of magnitude. Expect >5x as many cases covered based on non-public sources (for the markets we cover) across size tiers and sectors, and covering each case at an earlier (pre-process) stage. Our DNA is also significantly different - our team is comprised of people with financial backgrounds (not journalists) and our company was founded by a former private equity investment manager. This is reflected in our systematic, proactive, and data-driven research model.

### ​Which markets does M&A Insights cover?

​We believe in network effects and focus exclusively on the Pan-European market (in terms of target headquarter), however our coverage includes assets owned/acquired/sold by investors and shareholders residing outside of this specific market. We are industry-agnostic (as many of our clients are) and focus on transactions from the growth equity space and up. Our integrated Stocks tool, tailored for M&A use-cases, covers global tickers

results.title: Nicola Bowmaker | Chief People Officer, Vixio
results.author: Nicola Bowmaker
results.text:
# Nicola Bowmaker

Chief People Officer, Vixio

Chief People Officer at Vixio Regulatory Intelligence

London, England, United Kingdom (GB)

738 connections • 812 followers

## About

I am an experienced, senior HR/ People (MCIPD) leader with an extensive generalist HR background in the Private Equity, Media, Digital and Education sectors. I pride myself in being a trusted, integral member of the Executive Leadership Team, through my commercial, pragmatic and results-focused, people approach to HR. I consider myself a modern HR/ People Professional with a strong focus on Diversity and Inclusion, Wellbeing and employee culture. I have significant experience in Mergers and Acquisitions, organisation change management and employee engagement. I am collaborative and enjoy building strong relationships with my stakeholders. I enjoy environments which are fast paced, dynamic, passionate, varied and fun. My experience includes but isn't limited to: * Leadership * Culture * Equality, Diversity, and Inclusion * Wellbeing *High growth environments * Mergers and Acquisition * Organisational change * Digital knowledge * Talent Acquisition * International experience – understanding of international HR, countries including Germany, Australia, US, Canada and India.

Total Experience: 18 years and 4 months

## Experience

### Chief People Officer at Vixio Regulatory Intelligence (Current)

Oct 2023 - Present • 2 years and 4 months

London, England, United Kingdom

Company: 51-200 employees • Founded 2006 • Privately Held • Information Services

Vixio is a Regulatory Technology (RegTech) company and a trusted source of independent regulatory intelligence for professionals in highly regulated industries undergoing rapid and radical change. We're trusted by leading brands to deliver comprehensive, time-sensitive, and actionable intelligence on payments and gambling compliance, covering more than 180 jurisdictions globally, so they can stay ahead of regulatory change, mitigate risk and capitalise on new opportunities.

Department: C-Suite • Level: C-Level

### People Director at Comparison Tech

Nov 2022 - Sep 2023 • 10 months

London, England, United Kingdom

Company: 51-200 employees • Privately Held • Consumer Services

Comparison Technologies is a Private-Equity backed business that offers comparison and switching services to organisations such as SKY for their customers. In addition they reach directly to consumers through their own brands such as Broadband Finder, Broadband Compared, Digital TV and Mobile Phones. Comparison Technologies employs around 350 people across 3 sites in the UK and India and has an EBITDA of around £6m. A strategic role, leading the People function across the UK and India, reporting directly into the CEO and is part of the Executive Leadership team. The role is about deli
